figures.caption: Table 11: Breakdown scores for different existing rephrasing approaches.
Table 16: Breakdown scores for different mix-in dataset Dmix choices with FWHQ (HQ) or FWLQ (LQ) as Dsource. Parentheses indicate the mix-in dataset quality (HQ vs. LQ).
Table 15: Breakdown scores between synthetic-only and mixed training.
Figure 3: Fine-grained evaluation of pedagogical formats against the DCLM baseline. The best result in each task is marked with ⋆. We use the best-performing SmolLM2 1.7B as G.
Figure 4: GPU cost vs. performance. Symbols distinguish model variants; adjacent characters represent prompt formats (e.g., t: table, m: math).
Table 19: Macro-averaged scores for different Gemma 3 model scales at 10K steps.
Figure 5: FINEPHRASE prompts vs. baselines. The best result in each task is marked with ⋆. All FINEPHRASE runs use SmolLM2 1.7B on FineWeb, mixed with FineWeb-HQ.
